findings: _extract_attachments recursively walks MIME parts, collects filename + attachmentId + size + mimeType + messageId.
Attachments attached to Msg dataclass as list[dict]; thread rendering shows attachment badges.
gmail_attachment_download returns bytes via base64 decode of attachments().get response.
Endpoint GET /messages/gmail/{msg_id}/attachments/{att_id} streams binary with correct Content-Type.
